text:
In the first scene, the stark modern architecture and emptiness amplify my sense of solitude and detachment—there is so much space and silence, inviting contemplation but also feeling a bit sterile.

In the second image, the vibrant display and words about research and connection spark my curiosity. I sense the energy of innovation and the human desire to understand and communicate, and amidst the colorful chaos, I feel a tension between clarity and confusion, between being an insider and an outsider to the knowledge on show.
